title: JukeChunk - A JukeBox with greater range
description: Adds a Juke Box block with bigger range (1024 blocks) called JukeChunk
body:
A mod that adds a new JukeBox block, which plays music disks in a 1024 blocks range. The sound fades away (starting from 128 blocks range).

The block works with hoppers giving it automation and a large range of capabilities.

It could also be a good choice of server owners to make systems with juke chunks that play background music (for example, for modded servers' spawn hubs and areas)
